Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand User Input: Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Ordering Rules Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If Approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case If Rejected Do NOT finalize documentation Part 2 Desiderata Credit Check within 24h Inform Applicant within 48h of Loan Decision Follow-up Call before Close Case Event Log Case 1 Follows exact sequence Approved Case 2 Application Received Risk Assessment before Credit Check Credit Check Loan Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Close Case Missing Inform Applicant Case 3 Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case No Follow-up Call Task Identify normative violations desiderata failures suggest interpretations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 1 Sequence App Rec Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Doc Close Case Matches normative sequence exactly Timestamps All within same day Jan 10 Credit check within 24h Yes 30 mins Inform within 48h of decision Yes 2 hours Follow-up call Not present but desideratum Normative Compliant Desiderata Compliant with timing Missing follow-up call desideratum violation minor

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 2 Sequence App Rec Risk Assessment Credit Check Loan Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Close Case Normative Violations Risk Assessment occurs before Credit Check Violates ordering rule Missing Inform Applicant step entirely Violates sequence skipping rule Finalize Documentation occurs after Rejected decision Explicitly forbidden Desiderata Timing not main issue Follow-up call missing minor

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 3 Sequence App Rec Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case Normative Sequence correct No skipped steps Decision logic followed Approved Finalize Doc Close Compliant Desiderata Violations Credit Check Jan 12 0900 to Jan 14 1000 49 hours 24h recommendation Inform Applicant Jan 14 1200 to Jan 16 1500 51 hours 48h recommendation No Follow-up Call

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self-Correction Refinement during thought Check Case 2 again Missing Inform Applicant The prompt says Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome So skipping it is a normative violation Ill note that Check Case 3 timestamps Jan 12 Fri 0900 to Jan 14 Mon 1000 indeed 24h calendar time but business hours might explain it Ill mention business days weekends as a justification Desiderata for Case 1 Missing follow-up call I should note it as a minor desideratum deviation

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Justification Interpretation Case 1 Standard efficient processing Follow-up call might have been deemed unnecessary due to smooth process or clear communication Case 2 Could be a system error manual override by an inexperienced worker or a rushed process where steps were logged out of order The documentation finalization after rejection might be a clerical mistake auto-triggered workflow not checking decision status or preparing rejection letters mislabeled as finalization Missing Inform Applicant could mean notification was sent but not logged or genuinely skipped Case 3 Delays could be due to weekends holidays Jan 12 Friday Jan 13-14 weekend So credit check on Monday Jan 14 makes sense Similarly decision on Jan 14 inform on Jan 16 Tuesday accounts for weekend Staffing shortages high volume or manual review bottlenecks Missing follow-up call is common when process is straightforward or automated notifications suffice

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Self-Correction Verification during thought Check Case 2 Inform Applicant is completely missing prompt says Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome So its a skip explicitly note it Check Case 3 timing Jan 12 0900 to Jan 14 1000 49 hours Jan 14 1200 to Jan 16 1500 51 hours Both exceed recommendations Correct Desiderata clarification explicitly state these are soft constraints and represent efficiency quality opportunities rather than compliance failures Justifications ground them in typical BPM realities logging artifacts system automation flaws resource constraints business vs calendar time Format Use markdown tables or clear lists for readability All constraints met

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Structure Response Follow the 3 tasks explicitly Use clear headings bullet points For each case address normative desiderata and justifications Ensure tone matches process mining compliance analysis Cross-check constraints against log data carefully Structure Introduction 1 Normative Violations Case-by-case 2 Desiderata Deviations Case-by-case 3 Interpretations Justifications Summary Conclusion Check against prompt requirements All 3 tasks addressed Yes Clear distinction between strict and recommended Yes Justifications provided Yes
